---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

What feature are you requesting, in one sentence?

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve, or what capability does it add?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like it to work — commands, UI flow, hardware behavior, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

References, datasheets, papers, or screenshots that would help.
